title: Pricing
description: Flexible pricing plans to meet different needs

items.question: How to choose the right plan?
items.answer: Choose based on team size and needs. Free for individuals, Pro for small teams, Enterprise for large organizations.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes will take effect in the next billing cycle.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans offer a 14-day free trial.
